summary: ~40 analysts covering AMD. Average PT ~$296. Range: $120 (low) to $380 (high, Melius Research). Distribution: 41% Strong Buy, 38% Buy, 21% Hold, 0% Sell. Recent high-profile raises: DA Davidson $375, Susquehanna $375, Melius $380.
